projectDescription: A Claude skill that writes optimized, production-ready prompts for 30+ AI tools — LLMs, coding agents, image/video AI, and automation platforms — eliminating wasted tokens through structured intent extraction and automatic framework selection.
keyFeatures: Automatic target-tool detection and routing for 30+ AI tools
9-dimension silent intent extraction before generating any prompt
12 auto-selected prompt frameworks (RTF, CO-STAR, RISEN, Chain of Thought, etc.)
Memory Block system to carry forward prior session decisions
Token efficiency audit that strips every non-load-bearing word
35 credit-killing anti-pattern detection with before/after fixes
5 safe techniques only — no hallucination-prone meta-frameworks
Clarifying question limit (max 3) to avoid prompt-to-answer loops
Tool-specific profiles for LLMs, coding agents, image/video AI, automation, and 3D AI
publicApiSurface: Skill invocation: natural language ("Write me a prompt for Cursor to…")
Intent dimensions: Task, Target tool, Output format, Constraints, Input, Context, Audience, Success criteria, Examples

Templates: RTF, CO-STAR, RISEN, CRISPE, Chain of Thought, Few-Shot, File-Scope, ReAct+Stop Conditions, Visual Descriptor, Reference Image Editing, ComfyUI, Prompt Decompiler (Template M for agentic tasks)
Safe techniques: Role Assignment, Few-Shot Examples, XML Structural Tags, Grounding Anchors, Chain of Thought
Memory Block: ## Context (carry forward) block prepended to generated prompts
Prompt Decompiler Mode: break down, adapt, simplify, or split existing prompts
Output format: single copyable prompt + 🎯 Target + 💡 one-line strategy note
